criteria.criterionText: Then the LLM should generate a Markdown report at:

criteria.criterionText: And the report should explain the LLM's user-visible observations without requiring hidden chain-of-thought

criteria.criterionText: And every pass/fail claim should link to evidence in the QA bundle.
